overview.value: Impulse Space was founded in 2021 by Tom Mueller, a propulsion expert who previously served as a founding member and CTO of Propulsion at SpaceX. The company develops in-space mobility infrastructure, with vehicles that move payloads across and between orbits from LEO to MEO, GEO, and cislunar space. It designs, builds, and tests the majority of its vehicles in-house, an approach the company says ensures unmatched reliability, accelerates delivery, and reduces cost.
